title: Why More Context Makes Your Agent Dumber and What to Do About It — Nupur Sharma, Qodo
summary: Nupur Sharma argues that larger context windows alone do not improve agent performance due to the U curve effect, where models neglect middle sections of context. She demonstrates that iterative retrieval, hierarchical summarization, and self-correction, combined with an 80/20 reasoning-to-validation split, address both context handling and token efficiency in agentic systems.
